programme.desc: With Maggie back at Alexandria, Carol takes Negan on a journey to minimize the increasing tension; here, Negan reflects on his late wife, Lucille, and the events that led him to this point.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: While most of the landscape is destroyed by nuclear warheads, Strand thrives in one of the few inhabitable places left; Strand's search for survivors uncovers a stranger with an unexpected connection to his past.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: As Morgan, Grace and Mo struggle to adapt to life on the submarine, a food shortage forces them to face the nuclear fallout outside the sub.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: June and Dorie's routine in Teddy's fallout shelter is disrupted when they discover the origins of their home and its sinister connections to Teddy's past.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Negan continúa su visita a Alexandría. Spencer trata de entablar amistad con él para que lo designe líder de la comunidad, en lugar de Rick. Pero en ese momento Rick llega y se desencadena una serie de acontecimientos.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Guiados por Jesus, Rick y sus compañeros llegan hasta la comunidad del rey Ezekiel, para buscar aliados en su lucha contra Negan. Allá se reencuentran con un viejo conocido.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras buscan a Gabriel, Rick y el grupo se topan con una misteriosa región cuyos habitantes son completamente diferentes a todo lo que han conocido hasta ahora.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene, ahora en el cuartel general de los Salvadores, tiene que demostrar a Negan que vale la pena mantenerlo vivo. Mientras, Dwight es culpado de que Sherry haya permitido la fuga de Darryl y Negan le da una última oportunidad: encontrar a Sherry.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo de Rick busca provisiones y armas con las que contentar a sus nuevos aliados en la lucha contra Negan. Mientras, Rosita está cada vez más impaciente por comenzar la guerra y en Alexandria, Tara deberá tomar una decisión trascendental.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los Salvadores acuden a un encuentro con habitantes del Reino para llevarse los suministros que les cobran a cambio de protección, pero algo sucede y las cosas no marchan tal y como deberían.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los Salvadores visitan Hilltop inesperadamente, sorprendiendo a todo el mundo, y su intención va más allá de la de cobrar el pago de suministros. Además, Rosita y Sasha se dirigen al campamento de los Salvadores con la intención de asesinar a Negan.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo de Rick lleva a cabo una peligrosa misión para obtener armas de la comunidad de mujeres en la que estuvo Tara, quieran ellas o no cooperar. Además, Negan mantiene cautiva a Sasha.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: La batalla final contra los Salvadores se aproxima, mientras Sasha se encuentra a merced de Negan y Dwight trata de demostrar a Rick que ha sido sincero con ellos y quiere ver a Negan muerto.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Aunque la mayor parte del paisaje quedó arrasada por las armas nucleares, Strand prospera en uno de los pocos lugares habitables que quedan. La búsqueda de Strand de sobrevivientes lo conduce hasta un extraño con un conexión inesperada con su pasado.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras Morgan, Grace y Mo luchan por adaptarse a la vida en el submarino, la escasez de alimentos los obliga a enfrentar las consecuencias que la explosión nuclear generó en el exterior.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: La rutina de June y Dorie en el refugio antiaéreo de Teddy se ve interrumpida cuando descubren los orígenes de su hogar y sus siniestras conexiones con el pasado de Teddy.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: En contra del consejo del grupo, Sarah decide buscar a Wendell, y en el proceso se encuentra con un peligroso superviviente que la obliga a participar en una búsqueda personal.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Dwight y Sherry se convierten en unos bandidos éticos llamados los Caballos Oscuros, pero deben seguir un código que guiará sus pasos. Strand los recluta para una misión de rescate, pero los obliga a reflexionar sobre el código y su futuro.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Morgan se da cuenta de que no es el único que está buscando a Al y que su búsqueda podría haber puesto una diana sobre su propia cabeza.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Traffic on the lower Mississippi River has come to a virtual standstill because of the marauding tactics of a blind pirate leader and his cutthroat gang.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: James T. West is blamed for an impending international crisis when a quantity of priceless 'franconium,' a substance of fantastic power and owned by France, is stolen from under his nose at the French Consulate.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon determine to track down a missing Albanian princess when the regal young lady they have been guarding turns out to be an impostor.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Cheyenne Indians are believed responsible for the daily death of five laborers whoare working to construct a railroad line. It is claimed that the Indians will stop the attacks if they are paid $500,000 in gold spikes.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent James T. West fights off an unprovoked knife-wielding assailant and then meets a beautiful blonde named Marie.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: U.S. agent James T. West enlists in a secret army of fanatics whose demented leader is plotting to overthrow United States Army units stationed in the Southwest.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon go after Dr. Cadwallader, demented geologist who is systematically devastating the state of Wyoming with man-made earthquakes.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Gov. Bradford and his secretary, Miss Piecemeal, watch as the governor's statue is unveiled during a private showing at the Bolt Museum. Suddenly, the statue blinks, and Bradford, immobilized by an injection, is taken prisoner.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: U.S. secret agent James T. West is lured into a hospital where he is gassed and carried out in a coffin by the weird, zombie-like aides of one Dr. Arcularis.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent James T. West poses as a notorious desperado, Frank Slade, inaplan to arrest a Mexican bandit, Colonel Vasquez, who has been robbing banks in American border towns and then fleeing to the sanctuary of Mexico.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Iron Man Torres strangles a shop owner named Gilbert as secret agent James T. West passes by.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon set out to crack a thriving opium-and-alien smuggling operation in San Francisco and become involved in struggle for control of Hunan Province, China.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent James T. West is investigating the loss of government suppliers of kerosene and copper when his stagecoach is halted by a sheet of flame.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon, assigned to protect a Middle Eastern despot from assassination, find their task complicated by the attitude of the degenerate tyrant, Emir El Emid.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin O'Connor helps Tom Silva build a new deck. Roger Cook lays concrete pavers for the patio. A tile specialist shows Kevin options for the kitchen. Norm Abram learns about the new oak flooring.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger Cook puts down new asphalt. Norm Abram helps Tom Silva install cabinets. Kevin learns about cabinet lighting. The painting contractor strips wallpaper. Tom and Norm trim out kitchen windows.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger Cook acquires some plants. The painting contractor shows how to paint a ceiling. Kevin O’Connor meets with a countertop fabricator. Kevin helps Tom Silva construct bookshelves for the living room.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin O'Connor inspects the kitchen. Roger Cook goes shopping. The countertop fabricator installs a butcher block. Norm Abram and Tom Silva work with oak. The tile contractor installs the backsplash.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: In the final show from Newton Centre, all hands are on deck. Lead by Tom Silva, the modest project (with a modest budget) tightened up the old house while adding on living space for the family.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: For the season’s second project, the crew partners with the City of Boston and non-profit Nuestra Comunidad to take a foreclosed house and turn it into affordable housing in Roxbury, Massachusetts.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Norm Abram talks with general contractor David Lopes. Kevin O'Connor meets with a non-profit developer and our project house’s buyer. Norm examines the house’s structure. A crew raises the walls.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Norm Abram meets with the general contractor and looks at slate-like shingles. Kevin O'Connor examines the new siding. The paint color consultant explains the color scheme.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin O'Connor checks the house’s progress. Richard Trethewey sees the HVAC system. Kevin visits Florida’s Fort Myers area. The homeowner explains her interior design. Norm Abram installs decking.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger Cook works with students from YouthBuild Boston. The fence contractor installs a PVC fence. Norm Abram installs casings and paneling. A preservation plasterer casts elements for the house.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A carpenter installs crown molding. The homeowner considers paint colors. Norm Abram examines the new front doors. Kevin finds a marble fireplace. The lead carpenter installs the front doors.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Norm Abram travels to Dover, N.H. A stone specialist installs a marble fireplace. A flooring contractor installs a birch floor. The interior designer explains her kitchen designs.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger Cook works on the front yard. Norm Abram looks at the second unit. The homeowner learns to maintain her new countertops. Richard Trethewey installs a new water heater.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: With one week left, Kevin O’Connor learns to install tiles for the kitchen backsplash. Kevin visits our previous non-profit development. Tom Silva helps install the new stairs.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The job nears completion thanks to the dedication of general contractor David Lopes. The team gathers for the wrap party and all agree that it was a successful partnership.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: This Old House opens a brand new season by helping the Sharma family renovate their 1940s house on Boston's famous Charles River.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger preps for the new foundation of the entry hall. The sun porch gets demolished. Norm visits the original gatehouse. A team of concrete cutters cuts through the 10-inch concrete foundation walls.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom uses a crane to lift a 17-foot steel beam. Norm sees the insulated concrete forms used for the foundations and above-grade walls. Tom and Kevin discuss new lead laws and the kitchen is gutted.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom levels the kitchen floor. Norm frames the first floor. Richard sees how the Charles River has been formed through engineering projects. Tom and Kevin contend with the termites and carpenter ants.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Norm checks the new front entry. Tom turns the flat roof into a pitched one. We review the new kitchen layout. Roger shows native and non-native species. Norm and Tom set new deck footings.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom and Norm frame the sunroom’s roof and install deck underlayment. Richard shows an expensive new change order on the back-to-back basement bathrooms. Kevin learns about photographer Jules Aarons.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Richard installs floor-warming radiant heat. A new basement floor and footings are poured. The team makes aesthetic decisions. Tom installs vinyl clad windows to reveal the Charles River view.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Norm and Tom patch sidewall shingles. Richard installs ductwork for a hydronic HVAC system. Rough electrical finishes with 4-inch, dimmable LED recessed lights. Norm and Tom install a pocket door.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom blends new basement with old using acrylic stucco. Tom waterproofs the new entry roof. Four kinds of insulation are installed: eco-friendly batt, cellulose, and open- and closed-cell spray foam.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Jen shows her plan for the front yard. Kevin blends old plaster work with new. Roger safely takes down a Norway maple. Kevin and Norm tour Boston and the Charles River. Henrique stains cedar shingles.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger sets footings for the new pergola and selects a vine for the front yard. Norm and Tom trim the first-floor windows. Norm uses pitching sticks to create a mud job at the base of the new shower.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom puts down new-generation composite decking. New paint promises richer colors and low VOCs—Mauro shows Kevin how it performs. A few simple modifications to the fireplace mantel updates its style.

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Chrissy, whose skills in the kitchen aren't exactly sharp, invites a gourmet to share a home-cooked dinner, then pleads with Jack to be her secret stand-in-chef.

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Only Jack knows the truth when Chrissy, Janet, and Mrs. Roper think that Stanley is fooling around with another woman.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet loses her cool when the groovy guy and campus Adonis of her high school shows up for a date, and Jack and Chrissy conspire to leave them alone in the apartment.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Roper's on a rampage for the rent so Jack's visiting uncle, a charming rascal, passes him a bad check.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A ruffled Helen Roper takes a cafeteria job to teach husband Stanley a lesson, but returns a wreck from the experience.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack, Janet, and Chrissy plot to escape a boring Christmas party alone with the Ropers because the three roommates are invited to a big bash the same night.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack becomes caught in a dilemma when Chrissy believes he has bought her an expensive birthday present and the gift turns out to be a surprise for Roper's wife.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack becomes entangled in a feud between his two roommates when Janet accuses Chrissy of stealing a handsome young executive from her.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A tiny tyke terrorizes Jack and Chrissy with the threat of tears after Janet presses them into service as inexperienced, substitute sitters.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Chrissy cranks out amateur movies of Jack and Janet, and is misled into thinking she has an "interesting" talent for film making.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: All work no play makes Jack an angry boy when Janet hires him to work for her and acts like a tough boss.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: When Jack, Chrissy, and Janet set out for a gourmet dinner for the Ropers - designed to stave off an expected rent hike - the " meanest" sailor from Jack's navy days arrives and wrecks the evening.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack is in a panic - and in the doghouse with Chrissy and Janet - when a young pregnant woman arrives at the house and names him as the father.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack, Chrissy, and Janet find out how far Mr. Roper's garden has gone to pot when they find some unusual plants while weeding it.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: An unexpected visit from Chrissy's father, the minister, throws the kids into a panic. Jack decides to move out temporarily but Reverend Snow arrives before Jack can leave. Fumbling for an explanation, Janet blurts out that she and Jack are married.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Chrissy offer to baby-sit for Stanley Roper's parakeet in exchange for a couple of concert tickets.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A surprise birthday party for Jack is nearly spoiled when an old girlfriend turns up, ready to entice Jack back into her web. Guest Star(s): Loni Anderson

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack lies to his girlfriend in order to keep a date with his new romantic interest.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The women in Jack's life go to a nude beach protest and run into trouble with the cops.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Curious landlord Stanley Roper sneaks a peek at an X-rated diary Chrissy is typing and suddenly gets the idea that Chrissy is in love with him.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack gets caught in an exasperating willpower contest with Chrissy to determine whether he can give up women for longer than she can give up food.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Mysterious phone calls and secret meetings lead Jack, Janet, and Chrissy to believe that Helen Roper is having an illicit fling with her husband's best friend.

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.desc: A man attempts a daring stunt in a bar, the couple behind Date Camp goes to boot camp, and Daniel introduces a surefire way to avoid STDs.

programme.desc: A scooter driver struggles to avoid other vehicles, a vocal sexist experiences what it's like to be a woman, and Daniel introduces an app for nervous poopers on the go.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: It's week two on the frozen tundra and the name of the game is Rig Move. MGM is breaking down camp and moving every last piece of equipment to a new base at Langley to continue exploring for natural gas.

programme.title: Ax Men: Axpocalypse
programme.desc: In Alaska, Papac is finishing up the toughest most dangerous section of their site, but with the crew running full throttle to finish on time, one misstep could come back to bite them.

programme.title: Ax Men: Shelby Strikes Back
programme.desc: Deep in the Louisiana Bayou, Shelby the Swamp Man is back in action, and this time he's on a special mission.

programme.title: Ax Men: Shelby Gets Schooled
programme.desc: After stumbling upon a rare historical artifact, Shelby forms an unlikely alliance with Professor Sam Hyde of Southeastern Louisiana University, when they realize they are the perfect team to discover the lost history of the Swamp.

programme.title: Ax Men: Life & Limb
programme.desc: The Ax Men are back to take on North America's deadliest job. Gabe Rygaard faces the toughest challenge of his career as he struggles to keep the family operation in business without his father Craig, who suffered a career-ending injury last season.

programme.title: Ax Men: Sloppy Joe
programme.desc: Mother Nature as temperatures climb and a massive forest fire burns just over the mountain. Joe is still reeling from his injury, and what should be easiest site of the job could already be too much for the Papac crew.

programme.title: Ax Men: Family Tree
programme.desc: With Rygaard off to a tough start this season, Gabe is left with no choice but to call upon his son Aidan to step up and fill the family shoes. In Alaska, an overcrowded landing means one wrong move could wipe out the Papac crew below.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: With Korie still in Africa, Willie and Jep must step in and supervise Bella's sleepover. When a couple boys play a prank on the girls, Willie and Jep prove to be the perfect chaperones for the task.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Korie challenges Willie to come up with a romantic gesture without spending any money. Missy and Jase compete to see who can find a girlfriend for Mountain Man.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Jase's hopes to win the inaugural Duck Commander Fishing Tournament is buoyed when he is able to enlist the help of legendary angler Bill Dance. Meanwhile, Willie's vanity over his greying beard leads him to make a questionable decision.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Jase and Jep make a deal with Mia and Merritt to get them to go dove hunting with them. Si tries to make some extra cash by starting a West Monroe tour.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Jumping Asian carp have invaded Monroe's waters so Jase and the guys set out to try to stop them from spreading further. Meanwhile, Willie and Si have to run Willie's Duck Diner for the day.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The family spends a weekend at their childhood summer camp, reliving old memories and working to repair a tennis court Willie built twenty years ago. While at the camp, Jep tries to pass a lifeguard swimming test he failed as a teenager.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Rowdy's adoption is finalized and he officially becomes a Robertson. Jase gets his first massage and enjoys it more than he expected.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: After Willie and Jase lose Si's teacup, Si makes them go to great lengths to find it. When the entertainment for Gus's 1st birthday party falls through, Jep fills in as a magician.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie, Korie, Jase, and Missy take dance lessons from Sadie to prepare for Reed and Rebecca's upcoming weddings. Jase's plan to perform Reed's wedding ceremony may fall through when he waits until the last minute to renew his ordainment.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Si decides to retire to pursue a music career, the family organizes a party in his honor. Meanwhile, Willie, Phil, and Jase take a road trip to try to recreate an old duck call for Si's retirement gift. (Surprise performance from ZZ Top!)

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The Robertson family takes a look back at 130 episodes of Duck Dynasty

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Decepticons discover the lost civilization of Atlantis in the depths of the ocean. Still inhabited, the lost city is led by a king as power-hungry and deceitful as Megatron. The two forces unite and besiege Washington, D.C. with an energy shield.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: When the Decepticons install a powerful artifact from their ancient space vessel into Megatron, he becomes all-powerful. The Autobots shrink Bumblebee, Brawn, and Perceptor, so they can journey inside Megatron and remove the powerful “Heart of Cybertron.”

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: When the Decepticons install a powerful artifact from their ancient space vessel into Megatron, he becomes all-powerful. The Autobots shrink Bumblebee, Brawn, and Perceptor so they can journey inside Megatron and remove the powerful "Heart of Cybertron."

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Decepticons and Insecticons team up to attack a defense base filled with data that Megatron wants to get his hands on. When the Insecticons connect with the base's energy shield, they unexpectedly grow larger…and potentially explosive!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Decepticons gain control over the Quantum Laboratories facility and begin to re-route oil tankers to be harvested for energy. The Autobots and Spike must attack on two fronts to keep Megatron from converting the power of the enormous oil tanker fleet.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Decepticons gain control over the Quantum Laboratories facility and begin to re-route oil tankers to be harvested for energy. The Autobots and Spike must attack on two fronts to keep Megatron from converting the power of the enormous oil tanker fleet.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. The Autobots are banished from Earth, placed in a spacecraft and set on a crash course for the Sun due to a plan by Megatron and human industrialist Sean Burger. With the Autobots gone, the Decepticons are free to do as they please.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: As the Autobots watch over the powerful Negavator prototype weapon for the military, an attack, and accident leaves Red Alert malfunctioning and paranoid of his fellow Autobots. Confused, he strikes a partnership with the evil Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: As the Autobots watch over the powerful Negavator prototype weapon for the military, an attack and accident leaves Red Alert malfunctioning and paranoid of his fellow Autobots. Confused, he strikes a partnership with the evil Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. The Autobots and Decepticons begin to malfunction, losing their powers due to a lack of the compound Cybertronium on Earth. But the Dinobots are fully functional and in no need of Cybertronium, and the Dinobot Grimlocks has plans of his own!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. The Autobots and Decepticons begin to malfunction, losing their powers due to a lack of the compound Cybertronium on Earth. But the Dinobots are fully functional and in no need of Cybertronium, and the Dinobot Grimlocks has plans of his own!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 2 of 2. Spike and Carlee are stranded on Cybertron, desperate to find the Cybertronium needed to heal the ailing Autobots on Earth. Their only hope is to free the Dinobots, who are on Cybertron under the control of Shockwave's brainwashing program.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: When Starscream inadvertently activates a time machine, he and his fellow Decepticons are sent back to medieval times. Luckily Spike, Hoist, and Warpath follow them back, and with help from Merlin, they are prepared to defend the kingdom from them.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Crash-landing on the moon Titan, the Decepticons trick the population into believing they are “Sky Gods” and that the people should serve them. Desperate to free her people, a brave girl sends an S.O.S. to the Autobots…but will they arrive in time?

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: To stop the Decepticons from drilling into Earth’s core, the Autobots hijack and reprogram the mighty Devastator to use against them. But when they lose control of the giant, the only hope for survival is for the Autobots and Decepticons to work together!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: To stop the Decepticons from drilling into Earth's core, the Autobots hijack and reprogram the mighty Devastator to use against them. But when they lose control of the giant, the only hope for survival is for the Autobots and Decepticons to work together!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Autobot Tracks is damaged while trying to help authorities investigate a plague of car thefts in New York City. Once he is repaired by his human friend Raoul, the two uncover a Decepticon plan to turn the cars into an unstoppable Decepticon army!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Autobots participate in a charity road race. While they are racing, Megatron is given the perfect opportunity to use his latest weapon - the Transfixation Ray, a device that locks the Autobots into car mode, unable to change back to robot form.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Insecticons have multiplied into an army of thousands. The huge swarms feed on everything in their path, even blocking out the sun! Desperate for a solution, Cosmos, Bumblebee, and Spike travel to a far-off planet in search of a robotic insecticide.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Insecticons have multiplied into an army of thousands. The huge swarms feed on everything in their path, even blocking out the sun! Desperate for a solution, Cosmos, Bumblebee, and Spike travel to a far-off planet in search of a robotic insecticide.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Autobots and Decepticons are thrown through space to a strange world where they are no larger than an alien child's play toy. Suddenly the smallest household nuisances are the Autobots' biggest threats!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: En route back to Earth, the Autobots are captured and deactivated. Their only chance for survival is an alliance between Smokescreen and a shady alien space captain planning to win big on the Monicus Asteroid, site of the best casino in the universe.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: En route back to Earth, the Autobots are captured and deactivated. Their only chance for survival is an alliance between Smokescreen and a shady alien space captain planning to win big on the Monicus Asteroid, site of the best casino in the universe.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: When the city's hottest nightclub, "Dancitron" opens up, its patrons mysteriously start aiding the Decepticons. After his break-dancing crew gets run off by the club's security, Raoul gets some backup from his trusted Autobot friends.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: To aid in their latest scheme, The Decepticons kidnap a scientist. When Autobot Powerglide embarks on a high-altitude mission to save her, they form a bond that will keep his spirits flying high… even in the middle of a Decepticon fight.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: An S.O.S. seeking help from the Autobots arrives from the desperate people of the planet Traal, who have been forced into slave labor by Deceptitron. Seaspray arrives with the Autobots rescue team, and discovers much more than he was planning on.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Princess Aussie is the new WOW World Champion! After last week's shocking conclusion, the drama comes to a boiling point between friends The Fabulous Lana Star and The World's Greatest Attorney, Sophia Lopez.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Princess Aussie finally gets her championship moment after the WOW World Championship belt is taken back from the thieving Lana Star. But not without a rematch against Penelope Pink - set for The Main Event. Will Aussie's reign end as soon as it's begun?

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Beast finally speaks after discovering the identity of her attacker and WOW fans hear how she plans to enact her revenge for the brutal attack. Chainsaw's erratic behavior continues as she takes on Jennifer "Jen Z" Florez.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Vickie Lynn McCoy finally breaks her silence about her actions against The Beast before the two women meet in the ring, while the Mother Truckers: Big Rig Betty and Holly Swag get another chance for comeuppance against Las Bandidas.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Princess Aussie vows to be a new kind of fighting champion as she defends her title against challenger Tormenta. Adriana Gambino makes a case for a WOW World Championship opportunity in her match against Stephy Slays, while BK Rhythm and Gigi Gianni.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Mother Truckers are pleased to offer their services to WOW Owner David McLane as he strives to return order to WOW - by volunteering to handcuff themselves to managers Lana Star and Sophia Lopez in the Main Event Tag Match.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Beast seeks revenge in the worst way with a warning from the Fabulous Lana Star to remember before one embarks on the journey of revenge one should dig two graves. This main event match is too dangerous for WOW to sanction.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tonga Twins face the most difficult challenge to date. Chainsaw aims to continue her path of destruction against Stephy Slays - will anyone in the locker room be able to control her? Team Spirit looks to gain both momentum and recruits in their match.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The roadside dining, truck stop-loving Big Rig Betty and Holly Swag, finally get a chance to even the score with the high life jet setting Miami's Sweet Heat for the brutal beatdown three weeks prior in The Main Event. Jessie Jones makes a deal.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jessie Jones strives to make good on her deal with McLane in her opening match against Genesis and be added to the Championship Challenge Main Event. Jennifer Florez challenges IQ Superior's Classmaster.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Everyone's got a problem with David McLane after last week's Championship Challenge Match. David placates the angry roster by offering all participants a chance at the new champion - who's more than willing to face each of them.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After two groundbreaking wins, Champion Abilene Maverick finally re-introduces herself to the WOW audience. Backstage, as teams start to assemble for The WOW Trios Tournament, Team Spirit has a major announcement with major ramifications.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: With Amber O'Neal by her side, Jessie Jones makes her intentions towards former tag partner Americana crystal clear. With Amber by her side, however, Jessie might just provoke another former WOW Superhero to step up. Gloria Glitter aims to make a stance.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Lana Star and The Fab Four aim to be back on top with the gold this week in Penelope Pink's Main Event Championship Match against WOW Champion Abilene Maverick.

programme.title: Streets of Laredo

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: In the exciting conclusion to the World Racing Grand Prix, Yusei Fudo, facing his toughest opponent ever, must rev it up one last time if he hopes to defeat Aporia and save New Domino City from being destroyed!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: When the #1 ranked duelist and ruthless tycoon, Seto Kaiba, kidnaps Yugi's Grandpa to get the rare Blue-Eyes White Dragon card, Yugi must face Kaiba in the ultimate Duel Monsters showdown!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi is forced to face Duel Monsters creator, Maximillion Pegasus, in the mysterious Shadow Realm where all the monsters and magic are real. If Yugi loses, Pegasus claims Grandpa's soul as his prize!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi gives up one of his own Star Chips so Joey can board the boat bound for Duelist Kingdom and duel to save his sister's eyesight. Meanwhile, the cheat Weevil tries to cripple Yugi's deck by tossing his best cards overboard!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Pegasus announces that there are many strange secrets that will make his ultimate tournament unlike any they've ever had. Yugi must not only figure the rules out, but master them if he's to survive!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: After Yugi defeats Weevil's first wave of Duel Monsters, he's shocked to discover that Weevil has one last trick up his sleeve; a ravenous Great Moth that grows in power with every turn!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey finds himself courageously accepting a challenge from veteran duelist, Mai. But when Mai begins to demonstrate an unnerving psychic ability, Joey has to figure out Mai's secret strategy before falling victim to it!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The fisherman duelist baits Yugi into a duel on his own sea playing field for a home-field advantage. Can Yugi adapt to these new settings to turn the tide of battle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: If Yugi is eliminated from the tournament, KaibaCorp's crooked Board of Directors will transfer control of the company from Kaiba to Pegasus! Kaiba's brother Mokuba challenges Yugi to a duel to protect his brother's company!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi must duel a magical doppelganger of Kaiba, created from the greed and power lust Yugi wiped from Kaiba's soul.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi defeats the Blue Eyes White Dragon, but there are two more waiting in the wings! Will the real Kaiba reach Yugi in time to help beat this impersonator?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey decides to battle Rex Raptor without his friends' help to prove that he is man enough to take care of Serenity on his own.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey duels valiantly, but Rex Raptor has unleashed his secret weapon: the Red-Eyes Black Dragon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's classmate Bakura, possessed by his Millennium Ring's dark powers, traps Yugi and friends in a Shadow Game where they become the cards themselves!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Pegasus's hired duelist Panik cheats Mai of all her star chips, and Yugi vows to defeat him and win them back. But when Panik's Castle of Dark Illusions enshrouds his monsters in a black mist, how can Yugi defeat an enemy he cannot see?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Despite his astonishing disadvantage, Yugi boldly provokes Panik - "I'll finish you in three turns." Is Yugi bluffing, or does he have the advantage in this battle of wits?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba descends to the kingdom to face Pegasus. Has Kaiba changed since his battle with Yugi, or is he still the same merciless duelist? A battle between Kaiba's Blue Eyes White Dragon and Joey's Red Eyes Black Dragon holds the answers!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Bandit Keith's gang kidnaps Joey to a secret cave with a graveyard playing field. As Yugi and friends search for him, Joey faces Bandit Keith's zombie monsters which become stronger as they return from the grave!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey's last-ditch effort, his lucky Time Wizard card, fails against Bandit Keith's zombie monsters. But as his lucky streak comes to an end, will his improving skills as a duelist and his love for his sister inspire him to victory?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Joey band together in a team battle against the Paradox Brothers with all the Star Chips and entrance to Pegasus's castle on the line!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Paradox Brothers summon the almighty Gate Guardian, a monster that reflects all attacks! Is Joey helping Yugi in this duel, or is his lack of experience sealing their fate for defeat?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Joey each unleash their strongest monster, the Summoned Skull, and the Red-Eyes Black Dragon, but their strength pales in comparison to the tremendous power of the Gate Guardian.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: In order to earn the right to challenge Pegasus, Kaiba must first beat Yugi and take his Star Chips. The rematch between Yugi and Kaiba is about to begin!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba summons the Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon, the strongest monster in the game fused from three Blue-Eyes White Dragons! Yugi has lost all his powerful Duel Monsters, but a true duelist never gives up!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi begins spinning a strategy to put the Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon to rest, but he must decide whether to claim victory or spare Kaiba his life. Yugi's heart is split in two!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Having lost his star chips to Kaiba and his only opportunity to save Grandpa, Yugi is in a state of shock. Can Tea bring Yugi back to consciousness by defeating Mai for her extra star chips and teach Yugi the heart of the duelist?
